title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: firewalld bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for firewalld is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: firewalld is a firewall service daemon that provides a dynamic customizable firewall with a D-Bus interface.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Firewalld loads ipset which logs an "Unmaintained driver" warning (JIRA:RHEL-36234)  prevent rules from getting flushed when a rich rule with an invalid ipset is added [rhel-9] (JIRA:RHEL-67331)  CI: omit "scale" tests from parallel run, run separately and serially (JIRA:RHEL-68661)  Reloading firewalld immediately after restarting it terminates it (JIRA:RHEL-77738)  test issue: iptables output incompatible with some iptables tests (JIRA:RHEL-86909)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server - AUS

fixes.description: Firewalld loads ipset which logs an "Unmaintained driver" warning
CI: omit "scale" tests from parallel run, run separately and serially
Reloading firewalld immediately after restarting it terminates it

full_text:
An update for firewalld is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

firewalld is a firewall service daemon that provides a dynamic customizable firewall with a D-Bus interface.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Firewalld loads ipset which logs an "Unmaintained driver" warning (JIRA:RHEL-36234)  prevent rules from getting flushed when a rich rule with an invalid ipset is added [rhel-9] (JIRA:RHEL-67331)  CI: omit "scale" tests from parallel run, run separately and serially (JIRA:RHEL-68661)  Reloading firewalld immediately after restarting it terminates it (JIRA:RHEL-77738)  test issue: iptables output incompatible with some iptables tests (JIRA:RHEL-86909)
